_comment: Update pointer for the 'Update Library' flow. A device fetches this file, compares latest.libraryVersion to its installed catalog, and (if newer) downloads latest.url (the catalog manifest), then fetches each board listed in manifest.boards in order, validates them, and loads them via loadLibrary(boards, { libraryVersion }).

latest.notes: Minor: Maestro servo control + WLED lighting. Adds Maestro (Pololu Protocol) board (maestro-native): the device-native Pololu servo grammar — setTarget, goHome, setSpeed/setAccel/setSpeedAccel, setEasing, and restartScript/stopScript. The existing Maestro board (maestro) is now scoped to just the ;M sequence-trigger WCB verb, so each board carries a single transport. Adds WCB · WLED Lighting board (wcb-wled): the ;L, verb set — on/off/toggle, brightness, preset, color, effect (+ speed/intensity), palette, and a raw /json/state escape hatch. Board catalog 19 -> 21.
